product_overview: Reclaim accelerates employee expense reimbursement by combining OCR extraction, AI policy evaluation, and an HR triage dashboard so employees submit verified claims and HR focuses only on exceptions.
core_goals: Allow employees to upload receipts, verify OCR-extracted data, and submit reimbursement claims with a visible status timeline.
Enable HR to ingest policy documents into a Policy Studio and convert policies into machine-readable enforcement rules.
Automatically pre-screen submitted claims against the active policy so HR receives a prioritized triage queue of passed vs. attention-needed claims.
Provide a permanent audit trail that records AI extraction, employee edits, per-receipt verdicts, and final HR decisions for compliance and auditability.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate as Employee or HR with email/password and be redirected to the appropriate portal (HR -> HR dashboard, Employee -> Employee submit/dashboard). The login page supports demo quick-logins and shows an MVP toast for Forgot Password (see /login).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select Employee portal -> Fill in valid email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See employee dashboard (/employee/dashboard)
Navigate to /login -> Select HR portal -> Fill in valid email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See HR dashboard (/hr/dashboard)
Navigate to /login -> Use Employee Demo quick-login -> See employee dashboard (/employee/dashboard)

features.name: Form Validation - Login
features.description: Zod-backed client-side validation prevents empty or malformed login submissions and surfaces inline errors prior to authentication. Server-side rejection is shown when credentials are incorrect.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Submit login form with empty email -> See inline validation error for email
Navigate to /login -> Submit login form with invalid email format -> See inline validation error for email format
Navigate to /login -> Submit login form with empty password -> See inline validation error for password
Navigate to /login -> Submit login form with wrong credentials -> See server error banner indicating authentication failed

features.name: WF1 - Policy Document Upload (Policy Studio)
features.description: HR uploads a policy document (PDF/DOCX) to the Policy Studio which the system parses into structured, enforceable policy conditions. The Policy Studio shows processing states (Uploading -> Analyzing -> Saving) and lists the new policy once complete (Policy Studio described in PRD pages 9-12).
user_flows: Navigate to /hr/policy -> Open new policy editor -> Enter policy name -> Enter department -> Upload policy document file -> Optionally add appendix/source files -> Save policy -> See processing progress (Uploading -> Analyzing -> Saving) -> See policy appear in library

features.name: WF1 - Policy List & Management
features.description: HR can browse, search and filter the policy library, open an extracted policy for metadata edits, change policy status, and remove policies; uploaded policies persist as structured JSON conditions for compliance evaluation.
user_flows: Navigate to /hr/policy -> Filter policies by status (Active/Impending/Expired) -> Search policies by name -> Open policy card to review extracted metadata -> Edit policy name/department/version/effective date -> Change policy status -> Delete policy and confirm deletion -> Return to Policy Studio list

features.name: File Upload Validation
features.description: Policy upload and receipt upload enforce allowed file types and size constraints; unsupported types or oversized files are rejected with a clear message.
user_flows: Navigate to /hr/policy -> Attempt to upload an unsupported file type -> See rejection/warning for unsupported type
Navigate to /hr/policy -> Attempt to upload an oversized file (> stated UI limit) -> See rejection/warning for file size

features.name: WF2 - Employee Receipt Upload & OCR Extraction
features.description: Employees upload receipts (JPEG/PNG/PDF), review the AI-extracted merchant/date/amount/category values, optionally correct extraction mistakes (captured as fraud-trap signals), add trip purpose/destination and submit the claim for AI compliance analysis. Note: a known limitation notes the /employee/submit route currently shows a placeholder in the codebase; intended flow is described here (see PRD pages 10 and 18).
user_flows: Navigate to /employee/submit -> Upload one or more receipt files (JPEG/PNG/PDF) -> See OCR-extracted fields populated (merchant, amount, date, category) -> Review and edit any extracted fields -> Enter trip purpose -> Enter trip destination -> Submit claim -> See success confirmation and pending review status

features.name: WF3 - Compliance & Fraud Detection (HR Review)
features.description: HR reviews claims that require attention: the system surfaces AI judgments, confidence scores, per-receipt audit notes, and human-edit risk levels so HR can adjust approved amounts or make final approve/reject decisions. The HR review flow is invoked from the triage dashboard rather than a parameterized route (the per-claim review page is parameterized in the codebase).
user_flows: Navigate to /hr/dashboard -> Locate a claim in the Requires Attention bucket -> Open claim from the list -> See AI judgment, confidence score, and 2–3 sentence summary -> Inspect per-receipt line items with claimed vs approved amounts and audit notes -> Edit approved amount for a line item if needed -> Submit HR decision as Approve / Partial Approve / Reject -> Enter HR note for employee -> See confirmation of status update

features.name: HR Dashboard - Claims Triage
features.description: HR triage dashboard applies the Efficiency-by-Exception model: claims pre-bucketed into 'Passed AI Review' and 'Requires Attention', with search and filter controls to narrow results and open claim evidence panels for final decisions (PRD pages 11-12 describe triage buckets).
user_flows: Navigate to /hr/dashboard -> Switch between Requires Attention and Passed AI Review tabs -> Search claims by employee name, category, or status -> Open filter panel and filter by AI status, category, or amount range -> Open a claim row to view the evidence panel -> Click View All Pending Requests to see the full pending list modal

features.name: Fraud Trap — Side-by-Side Verification & Edit Detection
features.description: During employee verification, any edit of AI-extracted fields is captured as a permanent audit entry (human_edited flag and change_summary), a risk severity is assigned (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/NONE), and the signal is surfaced to HR in the evidence panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /employee/submit -> Upload receipt and view side-by-side verification -> Edit an AI-extracted total amount -> System records human_edited flag and change_summary -> System assigns overall_risk severity -> Submit claim -> HR sees the edit and risk level in claim evidence

features.name: Stateful Audit Trail & Claim History
features.description: Every submitted claim stores immutable records: original AI extraction, employee edits, per-receipt AI verdicts, totals, final HR decision, and HR notes so employees, HR and auditors can review the full chain-of-evidence (PRD pages 11 and 17).
user_flows: Navigate to /employee/claims -> Open a submitted claim -> See original receipt images, AI-extracted data, employee edits, per-receipt verdicts, and final HR decision
Navigate to /hr/history -> Search past processed claims -> Open a claim to see full audit trail and export settlement form

routes.description: Employee and HR login page with portal toggle, email/password form, demo login buttons
HR dashboard showing pending and approved reimbursement claims, KPI cards, filterable table
HR Policy Studio - upload, view, edit and delete policy documents (WF1)
HR claim review page for approving/rejecting a reimbursement bundle (WF3)
HR read-only view of a passed-AI-review claim bundle
HR history of all past processed claims
Employee dashboard showing personal claim summary
Employee submit page (WF2) - receipt upload, OCR extraction, claim submission
Employee list of own submitted claims

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials with role-based redirection (HR to /hr/dashboard, Employee to /employee/submit)
user_interactions: Click Employee Portal or HR Dashboard tab toggle
Fill email input field with valid email
Fill password input field
Click Sign In button
Click Employee Demo or Admin Demo quick-login buttons
Click Forgot Password? button (shows MVP restriction toast)
See error message on invalid credentials
See loading spinner while login is in progress

features.name: WF1 - Policy Document Upload (Policy Sync)
features.description: HR admin uploads a policy PDF or DOCX, backend parses it with LangChain AI, stores embeddings in pgvector, and the policy appears in the library
user_interactions: Click + New Policy button to open edit view
Fill Policy Name field
Fill Department field
Click Upload Policy Document drop zone or drag a PDF/DOCX file
Optionally add appendix files via Add Source button
Click Save button
See animated processing screen (Uploading -> Analyzing -> Saving steps)
See updated policy list after successful upload
See error banner if upload fails

features.name: WF1 - Policy List & Management
features.description: HR can view, filter, edit and delete policies in the Policy Studio
user_interactions: Filter policies by status (Active, Impending, Expired)
Search policies by name
Click a policy card to open edit view
Edit policy name, department, version, effective date
Change policy status via dropdown
Click Delete button and confirm deletion in modal
Click Back to Policy Studio to return to list

features.name: WF2 - Employee Receipt Upload & OCR Extraction
features.description: Employee uploads receipt images, the backend OCR extracts amount/date/category, and the employee submits the claim
user_interactions: Navigate to employee submit page after login
Upload receipt image (JPEG, PNG, PDF)
See OCR-extracted fields (merchant, amount, date, category)
Review and potentially edit OCR fields (discrepancy creation)
Fill in trip purpose and destination
Click Submit Claim button
See success or error confirmation

features.name: WF3 - Compliance & Fraud Detection (HR Review)
features.description: HR reviews flagged reimbursements where OCR amount differs from user-input amount; AI evaluates compliance against policy RAG
user_interactions: Navigate to a claim flagged as Policy Flagged or Awaiting Review
View AI judgment, confidence score, and summary
View individual line items with claimed vs approved amounts
View audit notes per line item
Edit approved amounts for line items (manual override)
Click Approve, Partial Approve, or Reject action button
Enter HR note on rejection/approval
See confirmation after status update

features.name: HR Dashboard - Claims Triage
features.description: HR views pending and approved claims in a filterable table with search capability
user_interactions: Switch between Requires Attention and Passed AI Review tabs
Search claims by employee name, category or status
Open filter panel and filter by AI status, category, and amount range
Click a claim row to navigate to review or view page
Click View All Pending Requests to open modal with full list

features.name: Form Validation - Login
features.description: Zod-based form validation on login page with inline error messages
user_interactions: Submit login form with empty email field and see validation error
Submit login form with invalid email format and see error message
Submit login form with empty password and see validation error
Submit with wrong credentials and see server error banner

features.name: File Upload Validation
features.description: Policy upload enforces file type and size constraints (PDF/DOCX/TXT, max 10MB stated in UI)
user_interactions: Attempt to upload an oversized file (>5MB) and see rejection or warning
Attempt to upload an unsupported file type and see rejection

known_limitations.issue: Employee submit page (/employee/submit) shows a placeholder card with only a logout button, not a full receipt upload form
known_limitations.impact: WF2 receipt upload cannot be tested through this route; may be accessible at a different path or via the employee claims page

known_limitations.issue: KPI cards on HR dashboard (Auto-Approval Rate 84.2%) show hardcoded mock values, not live data
known_limitations.impact: These metrics cannot be validated against actual backend data

known_limitations.issue: Forgot Password feature shows MVP restriction toast — not implemented
known_limitations.impact: Password recovery flow cannot be tested

known_limitations.issue: Edit existing policy is local-only (localStorage) for metadata; only new policy creation calls the real backend upload API
known_limitations.impact: Edits to existing mock policies are not persisted to backend
